style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, flowing left to right. On the left, four small labelled inputs stacked: CHAT, ARTIFACTS, REQUIREMENTS, CANVAS. They feed into a central row of four rounded agent badges labelled BUSINESS CASE, CHARTER AND RFP, PROJECT PLANNER, and TIMELINE, shown working together with small connecting lines. To the right, they produce a document labelled PROJECT PLAN, and a curved arrow labelled HANDOFF leads from there to a box labelled THE BUILD. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
